summary: Recovered and re-verified ADR 0317 from the dedicated live-apply worktree by restoring the repo-managed Keycloak runtime, proving fresh master-realm admin-token issuance and existing operator assignment lookups against `sso.lv3.org`, and hardening `scripts/provision_operator.py` so the direct-API fallback reuses the shared `.local/` secrets tree correctly from `.worktrees/` while supporting an email-free replay path for exact-main verification.

verification.observed: `make syntax-check-keycloak` completed successfully before the live replay, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-syntax-check-keycloak-r1.txt`.

`make converge-keycloak` restored the absent Keycloak/OpenBao runtime and its dependent shared publications, finishing with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=258 changed=10 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 : ok=18 changed=2 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=46 changed=5 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=70 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=338 changed=0 failed=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-converge-keycloak-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Direct API verification against the recovered realm
verification.observed: Fresh controller verification confirmed OIDC discovery `200`, master-realm token issuance `200`, the existing `matei.busui-tmp` user record, and the expected `platform-admin` plus `lv3-platform-admins`/`grafana-admins` assignments; the structured proof is in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-direct-api-verification-r1.json` and the runtime container state in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-keycloak-runtime-state-r1.txt`.

After correcting the shared `.local/` resolver, `python3 scripts/provision_operator.py --id matei-busui-tmp-001 --name 'Matei Busui' --email busui.matei1994@gmail.com --username matei.busui-tmp --role admin --expires 2026-04-08T00:00:00Z --requester florin@badita.org --skip-email` succeeded from the dedicated worktree, reused the shared password file, and reverified the live role/group assignments without resending credentials; the successful transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-worktree-provision-operator-r2.txt`.

verification.check: Focused regression coverage and branch governance gates
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_provision_operator.py tests/test_session_logout_verify.py tests/test_operator_manager.py` returned `29 passed in 0.25s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-targeted-tests-r1.txt`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed after the ownership-manifest corrections, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-agent-standards-r2.txt`.

notes: This receipt captures the branch-local ADR 0317 proof before the exact-main integration replay stamps the protected release and platform-truth surfaces.

The first dedicated-worktree replay attempt (`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-02-ws-0317-worktree-provision-operator-r1.txt`) intentionally remains in the evidence set because it exposed the original bug: `scripts/provision_operator.py` wrote under the worktree-local `.local/` shadow tree instead of the shared repo secrets root.

The first two `make validate` attempts were useful correction-loop evidence rather than wasted runs: `r1` surfaced duplicate exclusive ownership for the ADR 0317 document, `r2` surfaced duplicate exclusive ownership for `scripts/provision_operator.py`, and `r3` reached the final workstream-surface gate where this worktree's unrelated pre-existing churn in `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md` and `receipts/ops-portal-snapshot.html` confirmed the exact-main replay must use a clean integration worktree.

correction_loop.repair_action: Preferred the shared repo `.local/` tree for dedicated git worktrees, moved `.local` routing ahead of normal worktree path existence checks, aligned the fallback role/group mapping with the live realm, and added `--skip-email` so the exact-main replay can verify the live user without resending credentials.
